Ya, no need too hurry

GPT help me express more excatly.

【1.】 The acquisition of Sp. Romona is not time-limited, and the channels will be opened after the update on January 11.
【2.】 The redemption of Sp. Romona requires the consumption of 60 ordinary draw tickets.
【3.】 Sp. Romona is a special form of Romona, and the two may not be able to appear on the field at the same time.

In short, there's no rush. Wait for other players to evaluate first, and redeem it if you think it's suitable. Alternatively, you can wait until you have more resources to redeem it.

If I not mistaken, the Sp. Romona will also have an animation(Live 2D). And she is the special one as she will be the only character have Live 2D for now. The future don't have any news on other Live 2D yet
